title: bursa belgica
side_effects: Bursa belgica can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, headaches, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of bursa belgica may lead to liver damage and kidney problems. In rare cases, it can also cause respiratory issues, including difficulty breathing and asthma-like symptoms. Improper preparation or dosing of bursa belgica can exacerbate these side effects, making it essential to consult a medical professional before using it for health purposes.
